metadata.description: Personal collection of Claude Code skills

plugins.name: cite
plugins.description: Academic citation finder — look up papers by title and get BibTeX entries via Semantic Scholar and DBLP

plugins.name: fullstack
plugins.description: Scaffold a full-stack web application with FastAPI backend and React frontend (Vite + TypeScript + TanStack Query + Tailwind CSS v4)

plugins.name: shadcn-toast
plugins.description: Implement toast notifications using sonner with shadcn/ui integration — setup, typed toasts, promise toasts, custom styling, and full API reference

plugins.name: shadcn-form
plugins.description: Build forms with shadcn/ui Field components, React Hook Form, and Zod validation — setup, all control types, dynamic fields, async submission, and validation patterns

plugins.name: shadcn-datatable
plugins.description: Build data tables with TanStack Table and shadcn/ui — column definitions, sorting, filtering, pagination, row selection, column visibility, faceted filters, row actions, and reusable sub-components

plugins.name: shadcn-docs
plugins.description: Development guidelines and best practices for shadcn/ui — styling rules, component composition, CLI commands, theming, icons, base vs radix API differences, and accessibility patterns. Activates when working with shadcn/ui components, Tailwind CSS styling, or any React frontend using shadcn.
